P

President Hudson

Person · First seen 3308-10-06 · 5 mentions
Active: 3308-10-06 → 3308-11-30
Mentions Timeline (5 articles)
3308-11-30
Havoc as Thargoids Overrun Multiple Systems
Nine systems have called for help against massive Thargoid attacks intent on wiping out civilian populations.
3308-10-25
The Call for Unity
Newsfeeds across the core systems have reflected the increasing public demand for full-scale military cooperation against the Thargoids.
3308-10-19
Federation Bans the Far God Cult
President Hudson has approved a congressional bill to make the Order of the Far God illegal within all Federal systems.
3308-10-10
Winters Condemns Oppression of Thargoid Cult
The Popontia conflict and the mass arrest of Far God cultists have received civil and political criticism across the Federation.
3308-10-06
Defeat for the True Chapters
A battle in the Popontia system has ended with Federal forces overwhelming defenders of the True Chapters sect.
